name: evomate-codex-sidecar-template
description: Template: wire these non-blocking commands into Codex hook/session events. Keep `|| true` so EvoMate never blocks Codex.

events.command: npm --silent run evomate:observe -- --source codex --event user_message || true
events.stdin: pass the host hook JSON payload

events.command: npm --silent run evomate:advisor -- --source codex --event advisor_prepare --text || true
events.stdin: pass the current user prompt; inject output only when your Codex surface supports advisor/system context

events.command: npm --silent run evomate:outcome -- --source codex --event task_completed --outcome success || true
events.stdin: pass outcome summary JSON if available
